summary: Lead started M4-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 after M4-STRESS-VALIDATION-001 closed on main and taskctl ready promoted the M4 exit gate to READY.

tests_run.result: main was clean and synchronized before creating chore/m4-exit-gate.

decisions: Start M4-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 as the next READY M4 task after stress validation closure.
Use systems_architect writer and independent qa_reviewer per task owner/reviewer roles.
Keep scope to M4 gate evidence/documentation and do not start M5 or product/code scope.
risks: M4 gate may be PASS, PASS_WITH_LIMITS, or BLOCKED depending on evidence; writer must not overclaim.
requested_action: Writer should produce docs/GATE-M4.md and valid REVIEW handoff routed to qa_reviewer after required gate evidence checks.
